verdict: Derma E's serum integrates retinol with antioxidants (green tea, vitamin E) for synergistic anti-aging and protective benefits. The antioxidant inclusion supports skin barrier health during retinization, though concentrations appear moderate.

_research.name: Retinol Anti-Aging Serum
pros: Green tea and vitamin E provide additional antioxidant protection
_research.con: Antioxidant inclusion may reduce retinol stability in formulation over time.
